summary:
In a child with acute post-viral illness and systemic inflammation, central hemorrhagic necrosis results from ischemic injury and capillary damage due to reduced perfusion and endothelial dysfunction. Answer: A

I disagree with the previous conclusion because it falsely links schistocytosis and PNH. In a child with acute post-viral illness and systemic inflammation, central hemorrhagic necrosis results from ischemic injury and capillary damage due to reduced perfusion and endothelial dysfunction. Answer: A
